How it WorksFeatures
The Governed MCP Gateway

The third eye for your company's data.

Connect AI coding assistants to your internal databases without exposing secrets. PII masking, strict access control, and SOC2 compliant audit trails—all running on your infrastructure.

See Conarium in Action

Watch how Conarium intercepts and secures AI data requests in real-time.

1. AI requests customer data
AI Request
> SELECT id, name, email, ssn FROM customers
Data Returned
[
  {
    "id": 101,
    "name": "John Doe",
    "email": "john@enterprise.com",
    "ssn": "123-45-678"
  }
]
Audit Trail
The Problem: AI Sees Everything
When you connect Cursor or Copilot directly to your databases via standard MCP, the AI model has unrestricted access. It can see raw SSNs, financial records, and proprietary secrets. For regulated companies, this is a compliance nightmare.
The Solution: Governed Gateway
Conarium sits exactly between your AI assistants and your data. It acts as an intelligent, context-aware filter that masks PII on the fly, blocks unauthorized queries, limits row counts, and logs every single interaction.
Enterprise-Grade Governance
Everything you need to safely deploy AI coding tools in regulated environments.
Dynamic PII Masking
Automatically detects and redacts emails, SSNs, phone numbers, and credit cards before data leaves your network.
Allow/Deny Policies
Explicitly block access to sensitive tables like 'secrets' or 'billing' while allowing safe schema exploration.
Immutable Audit Trails
Every AI query is logged in SOC2/GDPR compliant JSONL formats, showing exactly who requested what, and what was returned.
Row Limiting
Prevent massive data exfiltration by enforcing hard limits on the number of rows the AI can retrieve per query.
Read-Only Enforcement
Strictly blocks destructive SQL operations (DROP, TRUNCATE, DELETE) so your databases remain pristine.
Self-Hosted & Secure
Deploy entirely within your own VPC. No data ever passes through our servers. You own the keys.
Why Conarium?

Read-Only Guards
Audit Logs
Tool Agnostic
